channel.title: htpasswd on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in htpasswd on IT notes

item.title: htpasswd
item.description: To create an htpasswd file (for htaccess “authentication”) using openssl: $ printf "foo:$(openssl passwd -apr1 PASSWORD)\n" >> .htpasswd If need to use crypt: $ printf "foo:$(openssl passwd -crypt PASSWORD)\n" >> .htpasswd
